Based on the context, Ginger is revealed to be working with Gabriel Shear, not as a DEA agent. The story concludes that there was no record of a DEA agent named Ginger, and she was wearing a bulletproof vest during the shooting, confirming her partnership with Gabriel. Therefore, Ginger really works for Gabriel and his secret group, Black Cell.

\boxed{\text{Ginger works for Gabriel Shear and Black Cell}}
